not_a_verdict: Root-cause revalidation. SUBMITTED for independent verification (author != verifier).
method: Revalidated the prior incident diagnosis (NF-NOOS-COMPLETION-EVIDENCE-REFRESH-001) against current repo + reachability, then read the classifier source directly. Live Supabase re-query was NOT possible from this host (no creds/CLI) so the live-timestamp facts are carried from the prior diagnosis receipt and the in-repo cockpit read; they are labelled as such below.

failed_hop.hop: worker execution -> completion callback (the ORGANIC producer that executes each loop body and POSTs the http_loop completion)
not_the_failure: authoritative store / sink (repair path writes 246+ rows successfully on same token => sink auth+schema healthy)

evidence_carried_from_prior_diagnosis.producer_scheduler_state: repository_dispatch loop-execution GHA last run FAILURE 2026-07-05; no successful organic completion since 2026-07-12

second_fault_detection_gap.summary: The completion classifier keys on freshness AGE ONLY, not provenance. Repair-labeled rows (cloud_trigger=noos_integrator_repair) are counted as sufficient recent completion evidence, so the classifier returns RUNNING_CONFIRMED for a loop whose ORGANIC producer is dead.

exact_location.defect_line: 177-180: `if dispatch_fresh and completion_fresh: state = RUNNING_CONFIRMED` — completion_fresh (line 175) derives only from completion_age_minutes vs threshold; the row's cloud_trigger / receipt_origin provenance is never an input to this function

second_fault_detection_gap.why_repair_receipts_masked_it: classify_loop_state has no provenance parameter. A repair write refreshes noetfield_factory_cycle_runs.recorded_at, driving completion_age_minutes below the 30-min threshold, so completion_fresh=True and the loop is reported RUNNING_CONFIRMED. The route for RUNNING_CONFIRMED is None, so the real (organic) stall never triggers a repair/escalation route. This is the false-green.
second_fault_detection_gap.corroborating_prior_finding: receipts/incident/noos-completion-evidence-refresh-001-diagnosis-v1.json remaining_findings[0]: 'the completion classifier keys on freshness AGE only, not provenance ... Recommend that classification treat repair-sustained freshness as DEGRADED/UNPROVEN, distinct from organic freshness.'

in_repo_now: Backward-compatibly extend classify_loop_state with organic-vs-repair completion separation + new states DEGRADED_REPAIR_SUSTAINED / COMPLETION_UNPROVEN / EVIDENCE_INCONSISTENT / STOPPED_OR_IDLE (Phase 4). Invariant: no repair/replay/manual completion can EVER yield RUNNING_CONFIRMED.

Deterministic motor state machine + invariants (Phase 3), local reference executor for the offline sellable slice (Phase 5), additive provenance migration FILE (Phase 4b), tests + product package (Phases 6-7).
external_activation_required: Restart/redeploy the cloud http_loop producer (Railway/Fly) — needs cloud deploy creds not present on this host
Apply the Supabase provenance migration (make supabase-migrate) — needs DB creds + is L5-frozen
Run 3 consecutive real cloud organic http_loop cycles + deployed-revision verification — depends on the producer restart above
